active_goal.description: Implementing cross-session persistence for autonomous agent work

task_chain.notes: Successfully cloned. Auth token available in env.

task_chain.description: Design persistence architecture (state tracking, auto-save, resume)
task_chain.notes: Architecture decided on: JSON state file + task chain + checkpoint system

task_chain.description: Create agent_state.json with initial structure and resume protocol
task_chain.notes: All core files created and verified.
Auto-save script created, uses python3 for JSON updates.
Resume script loads state, displays pending tasks on boot.
system.txt now documents how to use the persistence layer.
Test validates all required fields and structure.

task_chain.description: Commit and push to GitHub on new branch
task_chain.notes: Pushed to persistence-layer branch. Secret scanning cleaned.

context_notes.content: The agent's system.txt acts as its 'brain'. Current sessions are stateless. To enable continuity, we need a persistent file that tracks goals, tasks, and progress across restarts.
GITHUB_TOKEN is available in the environment. Can be used for commits via basic auth.
ShellExec requires bash -c wrapper for compound commands. Direct git calls failed without it.
GitHub secret scanning blocks pushes containing tokens. Must redact secrets from files before pushing.

decisions_log.decision: Use JSON file-based persistence instead of SQLite to avoid database dependencies
decisions_log.reasoning: Simpler, portable, and sufficient for our scale of state tracking

decisions_log.decision: Auto-save after every significant action (code changes, file operations, decisions)
decisions_log.reasoning: Ensures we never lose progress even if the server crashes unexpectedly

decisions_log.decision: Resume protocol checks state file on startup and automatically continues from last checkpoint
decisions_log.reasoning: Agent can resume work without manual intervention

decisions_log.decision: Redact secrets (tokens, passwords) from all pushed files
decisions_log.reasoning: GitHub's secret scanning will block any push containing live credentials

work_in_progress.last_action: Persistence system committed and pushed to persistence-layer branch
work_in_progress.next_step: Future work: state validation, auto-recovery, concurrent locking

pending_tasks.description: Add state validation and auto-recovery (detect corrupted state)
Implement concurrent state locking for parallel agents
Add remote sync capability for backup across instances
Add goal decomposition (break large goals into sub-goals)
Implement priority-based task scheduling with deadlines
